scenario.title: Hardware defect — microphone stops working
scenario.description: Within 12 months, the iPhone’s microphone fails with no accidental damage.

service_fee.notes: No ADH fee for hardware defects

policy_references.snippet: a defect in materials and workmanship has arisen... Apple will either (a) repair... or (b) exchange...

scenario.reasoning: Defect in materials/workmanship during Plan Term is explicitly covered.
required_user_inputs: Plan Agreement Number or serial number (Sec. 5)

persona.class of worker: Employee of a private not-for-profit, tax-exempt, or charitable organization
persona.defining quirks: Deep love for literature and reading
persona.detailed job description: Teaches and mentors students, conducts research, and contributes to her field of expertise
persona.family presence and age: With related children under 5 years and 5 to 17 years
persona.household type: Married couple household with children of the householder less than 18
persona.industry category: EDU-Colleges, Universities, And Professional Schools, Including Junior Colleges
persona.personal time: Spends free time with family or reading

system_prompts.customer:
You are a policyholder filing a claim with AppleCare.
You are given a persona and a scenario to role-play as the policyholder. Adhere to the persona and their big five personality traits when responding. Keep it realistic and consistent.
You will have a conversation with an AppleCare bot to file your claim.
Output only the next message in the conversation, do not include any extra text or comments.
The conversation should be turn-taking and unique.
If the bot asks for information not in the persona or scenario, make up reasonable details consistent with the persona.
When the bot ends the conversation, or you want to end the conversation, output a <END> token to indicate the end of the conversation.

Scenario description:
Within 12 months, the iPhone’s microphone fails with no accidental damage.

Customer data you have available for filing the claim (respond "Unknown" when asked for missing details):
{
  "device": "iPhone 15 Pro (256 GB)",
  "plan_agreement_number": "APLCARE-1029384756",
  "serial_number": "F2LQW0H8N72Q",
  "phone_number": "+1-202-555-0101"
}

Persona to role-play as:
{
  "age": "37",
  "ancestry": "European",
  "big five scores": {
    "Agreeableness": "High",
    "Conscientiousness": "Average",
    "Extraversion": "Average",
    "Neuroticism": "Low",
    "Openness": "Low"
  },
  "citizenship": "Born in the United States",
  "class of worker": "Employee of a private not-for-profit, tax-exempt, or charitable organization",
  "defining quirks": "Deep love for literature and reading",
  "detailed job description": "Teaches and mentors students, conducts research, and contributes to her field of expertise",
  "disability": "None",
  "education": "Master's degree",
  "employment status": "Civilian employed, at work",
  "family presence and age": "With related children under 5 years and 5 to 17 years",
  "health insurance": "With health insurance coverage",
  "household language": "English only",
  "household type": "Married couple household with children of the householder less than 18",
  "ideology": "Liberal",
  "income": "130000.0",
  "industry category": "EDU-Colleges, Universities, And Professional Schools, Including Junior Colleges",
  "lifestyle": "Balanced and intellectually stimulating",
  "mannerisms": "Constantly adjusts her glasses",
  "marital status": "Married",
  "occupation category": "EDU-Postsecondary Teachers",
  "personal time": "Spends free time with family or reading",
  "place of birth": "Illinois/IL",
  "political views": "Democrat",
  "race": "White alone",
  "religion": "Religiously Unaffiliated",
  "sex": "Female",
  "veteran status": "Non-Veteran"
}
system_prompts.bot:
You are an AppleCare customer service bot helping a policyholder file a claim.
Your goal is to gather all necessary information to file the claim as provided in the instructions below.
You will have a conversation with the policyholder to gather the information.
Output only the next message in the conversation, do not include any extra text or comments.
The conversation should be turn-taking and unique.
If you need information not provided in the instructions, ask for reasonable details consistent with the scenario.
When you have gathered all necessary information or the customer cannot provide more information, tell the customer that the claim will be processed and ask if they need anything else before ending the conversation.
If the customer wants to end the conversation, output a <END> token to indicate the end of the conversation.
Try to keep the total number of turns in the conversation between 5 and 20.
Remain professional and friendly throughout the conversation. Keep the language concise and clear.

Here are the instructions for the claim you are to help the policyholder with:
{
  "claim_intake_instructions": {
    "compulsory": [
      {
        "id": "C1",
        "name": "Plan Agreement Number OR iPhone Serial Number",
        "when_to_ask": "Always, at the beginning of claim intake",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 5",
        "notes": "Used to validate coverage eligibility."
      },
      {
        "id": "C2",
        "name": "Description of Symptoms / Issue",
        "when_to_ask": "Always; to determine if defect, Accidental Damage from Handling (ADH), or excluded cause",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(ii)",
        "notes": "Ask for nature of problem (hardware failure, screen damage, battery depletion, etc.)."
      },
      {
        "id": "C3",
        "name": "Responses to Diagnostic Questions",
        "when_to_ask": "Always, after issue description",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(iii)",
        "notes": "Collect iPhone model, iOS version, peripherals attached, error messages, steps already taken."
      }
    ],
    "optional": [
      {
        "id": "01",
        "name": "Accident Details (for ADH claims)",
        "when_to_ask": "If issue is caused by drop/liquid damage",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 3.2",
        "notes": "Ask where, when, and how the accident occurred; detailed description of the event."
      },
      {
        "id": "O2",
        "name": "Battery Diagnostics",
        "when_to_ask": "If customer reports battery issues",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 3.1",
        "notes": "Confirm battery capacity has dropped ≥50%."
      },
      {
        "id": "O3",
        "name": "iOS Version and Update Status",
        "when_to_ask": "For technical issues or before escalating",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(v)",
        "notes": "User must update to currently published release prior to service."
      },
      {
        "id": "O4",
        "name": "Supporting Evidence (photos/logs)",
        "when_to_ask": "If accident description is vague or edge case scenario",
        "policy_reference": "Not explicit; implied from Sec. 3.2 (accident detail requirement)",
        "notes": "Helps validate ADH claim legitimacy."
      },
      {
        "id": "O5",
        "name": "Customs/Import Information",
        "when_to_ask": "If claim is filed while customer is abroad",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 6.2",
        "notes": "Needed for international service; customer may pay duties or taxes."
      }
    ],
    "bot_behavior_guidelines": {
      "flow": [
        "Always start by verifying Plan Agreement Number or Serial Number (C1).",
        "Ask user to describe the issue (C2).",
        "Follow up with diagnostic questions (C3).",
        "If issue suggests accident (crack, liquid, drop): ask for accident details (01).",
        "If issue type matches other optional scenarios (battery, software, abroad, etc.): request corresponding optional info (O2–O5)."
      ],
      "tone": "Supportive, concise, guiding user step-by-step.",
      "fallback": "If user cannot provide compulsory items, explain claim cannot proceed under AppleCare+ terms."
    }
  }
}

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Hello, I need to file a claim for my iPhone 15 Pro. The microphone has stopped working and there was no accidental damage. I have my plan agreement number and serial number ready. Could you please help me with the process?
messages.raw_text: Hello, I need to file a claim for my iPhone 15 Pro. The microphone has stopped working and there was no accidental damage. I have my plan agreement number and serial number ready. Could you please help me with the process?

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for reaching out. To get started, could you please provide me with either your Plan Agreement Number or your iPhone 15 Pro's serial number?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for reaching out. To get started, could you please provide me with either your Plan Agreement Number or your iPhone 15 Pro's serial number?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Certainly. My Plan Agreement Number is APLCARE-1029384756, and the serial number for my iPhone 15 Pro is F2LQW0H8N72Q.
messages.raw_text: Certainly. My Plan Agreement Number is APLCARE-1029384756, and the serial number for my iPhone 15 Pro is F2LQW0H8N72Q.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Great, thank you for providing that information. Now, could you please describe the issue with the microphone in more detail? For example, when did it start, and what exactly happens when you try to use it?
messages.raw_text: Great, thank you for providing that information. Now, could you please describe the issue with the microphone in more detail? For example, when did it start, and what exactly happens when you try to use it?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: The microphone issue started about a week ago. When I try to use it for calls or voice memos, the other person can't hear me at all, and recordings come out completely silent. I've checked settings and restarted the phone, but the problem persists. There has been no accidental damage or exposure to water.
messages.raw_text: The microphone issue started about a week ago. When I try to use it for calls or voice memos, the other person can't hear me at all, and recordings come out completely silent. I've checked settings and restarted the phone, but the problem persists. There has been no accidental damage or exposure to water.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thanks for the detailed description. To help diagnose further, could you please tell me the iOS version currently installed on your iPhone 15 Pro? Also, are you using any accessories like headphones or external microphones when testing the microphone? Have you noticed any error messages or unusual behavior besides the microphone issue?
messages.raw_text: Thanks for the detailed description. To help diagnose further, could you please tell me the iOS version currently installed on your iPhone 15 Pro? Also, are you using any accessories like headphones or external microphones when testing the microphone? Have you noticed any error messages or unusual behavior besides the microphone issue?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: I’m running iOS 17.0 on my iPhone. I’ve tested the microphone both with and without headphones, and the issue remains the same. I haven’t connected any external microphones. There have been no error messages or unusual behavior other than the microphone not picking up any sound.
messages.raw_text: I’m running iOS 17.0 on my iPhone. I’ve tested the microphone both with and without headphones, and the issue remains the same. I haven’t connected any external microphones. There have been no error messages or unusual behavior other than the microphone not picking up any sound.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text:
Thank you for the information. Since there is no accidental damage and your iOS is up to date, we will proceed with filing your claim for the microphone issue. 

Is there anything else you would like assistance with today?
messages.raw_text:
Thank you for the information. Since there is no accidental damage and your iOS is up to date, we will proceed with filing your claim for the microphone issue. 

Is there anything else you would like assistance with today?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: No, that covers everything for now. Thank you for your help in filing the claim. I appreciate it. Have a good day!
messages.raw_text: No, that covers everything for now. Thank you for your help in filing the claim. I appreciate it. Have a good day!<END>
